overview: 3-step first-run tutorial. Full-screen 640×360 overlay (stretches to viewport). Each step auto-advances after 3s OR on tap. Dismissible.

slides.title: MOVE WITH JOYSTICK / 拖动左下摇杆移动
slides.focus: bottom-left joystick (spotlight + pulsing ring + drag hint arrow)

slides.title: AUTO-ATTACK / 靠近敌人自动攻击
slides.focus: hero + enemy + attack ray inside gold attack-range ring

slides.title: BREAK THE ALTAR / 击破中央祭坛
slides.focus: altar + beam + 3 legendary skill pickups + reward list
slides.closeCTA: Tap to start · 点击开始

usage: First-run gate: show only if localStorage['tutorial_seen'] !== '1'.
Render: fullscreen div OR ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height).
Game logic continues paused during tutorial (game already has pauseGame() hook).
Skip button (top-right): tiny 'X · 跳过' for returning players who opened by accident.
reset: Developer 调试用：localStorage.removeItem('tutorial_seen') 后刷新重现。
fallbackOnReturn: 若玩家已见过教程但进入新地图（arena_a ↔ lane_b），slide 3 可独立再播（'击破祭坛'是核心玩法，值得重提）。
